Requirement: The ontology shall cover major categories of software languages including programming languages modeling languages configuration languages and query languages
The ontology shall enable classification of programming languages by paradigm such as functional object-oriented procedural and logical
The ontology shall link software language entities to their corresponding Wikipedia resources using foaf:isPrimaryTopicOf or foaf:page
The ontology shall capture the grammar formalism associated with each language
The ontology shall capture tools and frameworks associated with software languages
The ontology shall represent software language engineering activities
The ontology shall capture technology spaces relevant to software languages
